flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Suffolk University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($41.6k → $47.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Suffolk University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($41.6k → $47.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Suffolk University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).
